chunk_a.description: Presses the A button 3 times. Useful for safely chunking through early-game battles or text without risking over-pressing and missing important HP updates.

get_bike_voucher_correct.description: Correctly sequences the exact number of A presses to open the Fan Club Chairman's YES/NO prompt and select YES.
get_bike_voucher_correct.python_script:
import json

seq = [
    "Right", "sleep 500",
    "A", "sleep 6000",   
    "A", "sleep 6000",   
    "A", "sleep 8000",   
    "Up", "sleep 500",
    "A", "sleep 2000",   
]
for _ in range(20):
    seq.extend(["A", "sleep 1500"])
print(json.dumps(seq))

history.commit_message: Initial version

observe_chairman.description: Presses A to interact, then sleeps for 25 seconds to observe natural text flow without auto-advancer interference.
observe_chairman.python_script:
import json
seq = ["Right", "sleep 500"]
seq.extend(["A", "sleep 2000"])
seq.extend(["A", "sleep 2000"])
seq.extend(["A", "sleep 2000"])
seq.extend(["A", "sleep 8000"])
print(json.dumps(seq))

history.commit_message: Initial version
Redefine observe_chairman to carefully step through text and pause to see the prompt

pace_grass.description: Paces back and forth to trigger encounters. Parametrized to handle any map and axis.

length.description: Number of steps in one direction before turning around.

iterations.description: Number of back-and-forth loops to execute.

pace_grass.python_script:
import json

axis = str(input_data.get('axis', 'horizontal'))
length = int(input_data.get('length', 2))
iterations = int(input_data.get('iterations', 5))

buttons = []
dir1 = 'Right' if axis == 'horizontal' else 'Down'
dir2 = 'Left' if axis == 'horizontal' else 'Up'

for _ in range(iterations):
    for _ in range(length):
        buttons.append(dir1)
    for _ in range(length):
        buttons.append(dir2)

print(json.dumps(buttons[:100]))

history.commit_message: Initial version
